base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of simon_crouch_duck — a character from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. Crouch — essential for finding hidden passages (whip-blocks in graveyards while crouching). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Crouch — essential for finding hidden passages (whip-blocks in graveyards while crouching)
